description: Clears children inside standard user cache folders without removing the folders themselves.
Removes npm cache, logs, and temporary npx cache.
Removes rebuildable Gradle caches and worker state.
Runs Homebrew cleanup or clears Homebrew cache children in Trash mode.
Removes log files older than seven days and empty log subfolders.

paths: Go, pip, uv, Poetry, SwiftPM, Maven, Composer, RubyGems, and Bundler caches
description: Removes rebuildable language and toolchain caches that can be downloaded or rebuilt again.

paths: Chrome, Brave, Edge, Arc, Code, Cursor, Slack, Comet, Trae nested cache folders
description: Removes nested cache folders only; does not remove browser profiles, cookies, bookmarks, settings, or password data.
Removes stale node_modules folders under common personal project locations.
Removes old downloaded .dmg, .pkg, .mpkg, .xip, .ipsw, and .iso installer files.

paths: Xcode DeviceSupport; Android NDK/system images; simulator state
description: Removes heavy SDK and simulator artifacts that may need reinstalling or resetting.
Asks tmutil to thin local snapshots; not recoverable through cleanroom Trash mode.

paths: ~/.gemini generated recordings, scratch, brain, implicit, conversations
description: Removes generated AI-agent workspace state and local conversation caches where known.

paths: ~/.lmstudio/models; ~/.ollama/models; Hugging Face and related model caches
description: Removes downloaded local AI model stores and backend extensions.

paths: ~/.colima; ~/.lima; Docker Desktop VM data; Podman storage
description: Removes local container VM disks, images, and volumes.
